5313.one_line_summary: Minimal interface for identifying accounts that control contracts.
5313.notes: Slimmed-down alternative to ERC-173; does not implement ERC-165 for backward compatibility with existing markets.

5334.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension adding time-limited user role with restricted permissions.
5334.notes: Supports role-based access control for NFTs; user role separates usage from ownership.

5375.one_line_summary: Standard for storing NFT authorship info and consent proofs in metadata.
5375.notes: Uses ERC-712 signed messages to prove author consent without requiring on-chain transactions from authors.

5380.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension enabling token owners to grant limited usage rights to others.
5380.notes: Allows granular entitlements separate from ownership, with optional enumerable and metadata extensions.

5409.one_line_summary: ERC-1155 extension adding ownerOf to support non-fungible tokens within ERC-1155.
5409.notes: Enables detecting unique tokens and retrieving owner on-chain without implementing ERC-721.

5437.one_line_summary: Interface for expressing security contact via asymmetric encryption keys.
5437.notes: Provides standardized channel for security researchers to report vulnerabilities; supports GPG and future schemes.

5453.one_line_summary: General permit protocol for approving any function call via signatures.
5453.notes: Extends ERC-5750; supports multi-sig and threshold approvals in single transaction; supersedes ERC-2612 scope.

5484.one_line_summary: Soulbound NFT standard with immutable ownership and predetermined burn authorization.
5484.notes: Non-transferable credentials; burn authority immutable after issuance; extends ERC-721.

5485.one_line_summary: Interface for declaring contract sovereignty, jurisdiction, accreditation, and enforcement pathways.
5485.notes: Bridges real-world legal frameworks with on-chain systems; supports regulated and institutional use cases.

5489.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension embedding hyperlinks in NFTs for rich content attachments.
5489.notes: Allows NFT owners to authorize addressees to manage URL slots; enables metadata-like customization.

5496.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for managing shareable, time-limited privileges attached to tokens.
5496.notes: Privileges can be cloned and distributed; separate from ownership; supports on-chain and off-chain utilities.

5501.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension adding time-limited user role for rental and delegation scenarios.
5501.notes: Borrowed flag prevents owner override during rental; owner retains NFT for airdrops; optional balance and terminable extensions.

5505.one_line_summary: ERC-1155 extension enabling forced acquisition of fractionalized asset-backed NFTs.
5505.notes: Addresses fractionalization deadlock; enables majority holders to acquire remaining shares at TWAP price.

5507.one_line_summary: Refund interface for ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 tokens during initial offerings.
5507.notes: Funds escrowed until deadline; supports compliance with EU distance selling regulations; includes batch refund optional extensions.

5516.one_line_summary: Non-transferable multi-owner soulbound tokens for credentials and certificates.
5516.notes: Supports multi-cohort issuance via deterministic tokenId; irreversible renunciation; enables account recovery via multi-owner binding.
